# Figma Community — Untitled UI public files to manually duplicate

The Untitled UI Pro `.fig` (v8 PRO VARIABLES / PRO STYLES / PRO LITE) is
paywalled via https://www.untitledui.com/pricing — it is not available as
a public community file and no public leak exists that we could use
without violating the upstream TOS.

The **publicly accessible Figma community files** below are either the
official free tier or older versions published by the same author
(Jordan Hughes). Open each URL in the Figma desktop app or web app, click
"Duplicate", and the file lands in your drafts. All have been verified
live as of the search date and credit Jordan Hughes as author.

## Primary — duplicate these first

| File | URL | Notes |
|------|-----|-------|
| Untitled UI — FREE kit and design system v2.0 | https://www.figma.com/community/file/1020079203222518115/untitled-ui-free-figma-ui-kit-and-design-system-v2-0 | The canonical free base. 14.9k likes / 323k duplicates. Author: Jordan Hughes. |
| Ultimate starter style guide UI kit — Untitled UI | https://www.figma.com/community/file/1032034479648612179/ultimate-starter-style-guide-ui-kit-untitled-ui | Tokens + type + colour + spacing page templates in the Untitled UI grammar. |
| Untitled UI Icons — 1,100+ essential Figma icons | https://www.figma.com/community/file/1114001199549197320/untitled-ui-icons-1-100-essential-figma-icons | Free icon set — sibling to the Pro 4,600. Useful baseline for the icons-4k-synth/ work. |
| Premium company logos UI kit — Untitled UI | https://www.figma.com/community/file/1075951506305516943/premium-company-logos-ui-kit-untitled-ui | Logo placeholders used across the template screens. |

## Secondary — supporting pages

- https://www.untitledui.com/resources/figma-files — the canonical list page with all the official links (free + paid). Use this if the community links above rot.
- https://www.untitledui.com/free-figma-ui-kit — the landing page for the free kit, with a direct community-link button.
- https://www.untitledui.com/figma — the overview of Figma-kit features (PRO vs PRO LITE vs FREE).

## Paid — NOT publicly accessible, do not chase leaks

| Item | Status |
|------|--------|
| Untitled UI — PRO VARIABLES (v8.0) `.fig` | Paywalled. Requires account + paid license at https://www.untitledui.com/pricing . No community duplicate exists. |
| Untitled UI — PRO STYLES (v8.0) `.fig` | Paywalled. Same as above. |
| Untitled UI — PRO LITE (v8.0) `.fig` | Paywalled (bundled with PRO). No community duplicate. |

We are explicitly **not** acquiring the paid `.fig` via unofficial
channels — the research reference in `untitled-ui-pro-figma-schema.json`
and the PNG renders in `figma-pages-as-png/` are the authorised
Pro-tier-equivalent substitute for internal Clawmachine use.

## Strategy if the operator wants the real Pro `.fig` later

1. Buy a single-seat PRO license at https://www.untitledui.com/pricing (currently $349 lifetime as of 2026-04-21 per the pricing page described in search). The license covers one user, all updates, commercial use.
2. Duplicate the three `.fig` files from the author's file list into the operator's Figma drafts.
3. Export frame PNGs via Figma's built-in export or the Figma REST API using the paid-account token.

Until then, the public files above plus the HTML templates in this repo
plus `figma-pages-as-png/` should cover all downstream design-feed
consumers.
